zh.lifeSummary: William Coningsby是Roger Coningsby和Joan Bagot的兒子，於大約1265年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾莫頓 巴格特。他於1299年1月25日與Beatrix Frecie結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1351年之後在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯，埋葬在法國帕-德-卡拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Coningsby是Roger Coningsby和Joan Bagot的儿子，于大约1265年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾莫頓 巴格特。他于1299年1月25日与Beatrix Frecie结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1351年之后在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯，埋葬在法国帕-德-卡拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William Coningsby was born about 1265, in Morton Bagot, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Roger Coningsby and Joan Bagot. He married Beatrix Frecie on 25 January 1299. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died after 1351, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, and was buried in Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: William Coningsby est né environ 1265, à Morton Bagot, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Roger Coningsby et Joan Bagot. Il a épousé Beatrix Frecie le 25 janvier 1299. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé après 1351, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, et a été enterré à Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: William Coningsby wurde um 1265 in Morton Bagot, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Roger Coningsby und Joan Bagot geboren. Er hat am 25. Januar 1299 Beatrix Frecie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb nach 1351 in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William Coningsby è nato il circa 1265 nel Morton Bagot, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Roger Coningsby e Joan Bagot. Lui sposato Beatrix Frecie il 25 gennaio 1299. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1351, nel Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, e fu sepolto a Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: William Coningsbyは約1265年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアモートン バゴトでRoger ConingsbyとJoan Bagotの息子として生まれた。1299年1月25日にBeatrix Frecieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1351年以後にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスで死去し，フランスプアス-デ-カレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Coningsby(은)는 대략 1265년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 모르턴 바고트에서 Roger Coningsby(와)과 Joan Bagot의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1299년 1월 25일 Beatrix Frecie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1351년 이후 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 사망했으며 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Coningsby nasceu aproximadamente 1265, em Morton Bagot, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Roger Coningsby e Joan Bagot. Ele casou-se com Beatrix Frecie em 25 de janeiro de 1299. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu após 1351, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, e foi sepultado em Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: William Coningsby родился около 1265 г. в местности мортон багот, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Roger Coningsby и Joan Bagot. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix Frecie 25 января 1299 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер после 1351 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция и был похоронен в местности пас-де-калеи, Франция.

Se casó con Beatrix Frecie el 25 de enero de 1299. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 1351, en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, y fue sepultado en Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
